landing.title: HiveDeliver - AI Swarm Drone Delivery
landing.subtitle: Autonomous last-mile delivery powered by intelligent drone swarms.
landing.heroTitle: Intelligent Drone Swarms for Last-Mile Delivery
landing.heroDesc: Our AI-powered swarm coordinates autonomous drones to deliver packages faster, cheaper, and smarter — optimized for SMEs across urban and rural areas.
landing.illustrationDesc: Drone swarms coordinate routes from warehouse to SME destinations in real time.
landing.whyFunctionTitle: From route intelligence to safety controls, HiveDeliver gives teams practical tools they can use every day.

benefits.fasterDesc: Swarm coordination cuts idle travel and reduces wait times for small businesses.
benefits.lowerCostDesc: Autonomous assignment lowers manual dispatch overhead and fuel-equivalent spend.
benefits.aiSwarmDesc: Hive-based intelligence balances tasks across drones in real time.
benefits.smartRouteDesc: Dynamic rerouting avoids congestion and improves successful delivery rates.
benefits.resilientOpsDesc: Automatic recovery logic keeps deliveries moving through sudden weather and traffic changes.
benefits.ecoSmartDesc: Battery-aware flight planning reduces unnecessary energy usage while keeping ETA commitments.

dashboard.title: Delivery Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Monitor active operations, delivery flow, and drone assignment in one place.

map.title: Live Drone Map
map.subtitle: Visualize warehouse dispatch, active drones, delivery routes, rural coverage, and no-fly zones in real time.
map.routeAdjustedSevere: Drone route automatically adjusted due to severe weather.
map.routeAdjustedCaution: Route optimized for moderate weather conditions.
map.routeNormalWeather: Weather conditions are stable for normal flight operations.
map.coordDesc1: The AI engine staggers departures and path vectors to reduce overlap risk and avoid mid-route conflicts. Rural and critical deliveries are prioritized when swarm logic is enabled.
map.coordDesc2: Hover over any drone marker to see real-time info including drone ID, parcels assigned, battery level, and estimated time of arrival.
map.swarmCoordinationSubtitle: Live drone-to-drone mesh data, adaptive routing, and task balancing across the active fleet.
map.currentCoverageFootprint: Current swarm footprint across active delivery lanes.
map.safeSeparationTracking: Autonomous spacing guardrails between neighboring drones.
map.weatherAndPriorityAware: Continuously recalculating for weather, battery, and delivery priority.
map.taskRedistributionEnabledMessage: Nearby drones redistributed to stabilize the route network.
map.trafficReroutedDrone: Drone {{droneId}} temporarily rerouted to reduce congestion.

support.description: Use the chatbot below to quickly check parcel status, request help, or submit delivery support requests.

addresses.subtitle: Manage your delivery addresses for faster checkout and accurate deliveries.

login.title: Sign in to HiveDeliver
login.subtitle: Access your dashboard, create orders, and monitor live drone deliveries.
login.registrationSuccess: Account created successfully. Please sign in with your new credentials.
login.errorSignIn: Unable to sign in. Please check your credentials.
login.captchaRequired: Please complete the security verification first.
login.tooManyAttempts: Too many failed attempts. Account locked for 5 minutes.
login.lockedMessage: Too many failed login attempts. Try again in
login.captchaVerified: ✅ Verified — I am not a robot
login.securityPoint1: • Account locks after {{count}} failed attempts (5 min)
login.securityPoint2: • CAPTCHA verification required on every login

register.title: Create your HiveDeliver account
register.subtitle: Register to manage deliveries and view live drone activity.

security.title: Security & Blockchain Dashboard
security.subtitle: Monitor encrypted communications, blockchain ledger, and secure delivery verification
security.blockchainLedgerDesc: Immutable record of all delivery events. Each block is cryptographically linked to ensure no tampering.
security.blockchainHow: Every delivery milestone (pickup, handoff, delivery) is recorded as a block. Each block contains a hash of the previous block, creating an unbreakable chain of custody.
security.otpDesc: Parcels can only be released after the recipient enters a 6-digit OTP sent to their phone. This ensures secure delivery.
security.testOtpNote: 123456 (Use this code to verify the secure release mechanism)
security.awaitingOtp: Awaiting OTP verification for secure release
security.otpDialogDesc: A 6-digit OTP has been sent to the recipient's phone. Enter it below to verify secure release.
security.otpSuccessMsgEnd: is now released and ready for pickup.

swarm.title: Advanced Swarm Optimization
swarm.subtitle: Battery-Aware Handoff and Multi-Stop Route Optimization
swarm.batteryHandoffDesc: When a drone's battery drops below 20% during delivery, a relief drone is automatically dispatched to meet it at a midpoint and take over the parcel. This ensures uninterrupted service and maximizes fleet efficiency.
swarm.batteryHandoffHow: Primary drone continues to delivery point until battery reaches 20%. At that moment, a secondary drone with sufficient battery is dispatched to meet it. The parcel is transferred, and the primary drone returns to base for charging.
swarm.multiStopDesc: Instead of assigning one drone per delivery, the system now bundles multiple small parcels into a single optimized route. Each drone calculates the most efficient path to visit all stops, reducing total flight time and energy consumption.
swarm.benefitsDesc: Reduced flight time by 15-25%, Lower energy consumption, Fewer drones needed, Faster overall delivery completion

interactive.title: Interactive Features
interactive.subtitle: Live Drone-Eye View and Voice Commands for Dispatch
interactive.liveDroneViewDesc: Watch real-time video feeds from active delivery drones. Monitor altitude, speed, location, and delivery progress from the drone's perspective.
interactive.cameraFeedDesc: Each drone is equipped with a high-resolution camera that streams live video to the dispatch center. Use this to verify delivery locations, monitor traffic conditions, and ensure safe operations.
interactive.voiceCommandsDesc: Control the drone fleet hands-free using natural language voice commands. Perfect for busy dispatch managers who need to multitask.
interactive.voiceRecognitionDesc: Powered by advanced speech-to-text AI. Supports commands like 'Assign Drone H3 to Parcel P102', 'Show battery status', 'Initiate handoff', and more.
interactive.voiceCommandPrompt: The system detected the following command. Click Execute to proceed.
interactive.browserNotSupported: Your browser does not support the Web Speech API. Please use Chrome or Edge for voice commands.
interactive.micDenied: Microphone access was denied. Please allow microphone permission in your browser settings and try again.
interactive.tryHint: Try: "Assign Drone H1 to Parcel P102" or "Battery status for H3"
